:"dragon1967://webview?url=https%3A%2F%2Freading.snssdk.com%2Fwap%2Fbook-operator.html"}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"运营官","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"#5BA1E1"}","zh_title":"运营官"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7207613634954923060","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世，超真实，无系统，硬核，火车，重卡，慢节奏，公路文】
【本书拥有完整独立的世界观，请勿将其他同类作品混淆】
【成长型主角，想一上来就看到主角不犯错的，无敌的，什么事都方方面面做到的自觉退出，本书不适合你】
于全世界流行的新型病毒只是一个开端，在绝大部分人受到感染后，病毒开始在人体内产生如同程序控制的变异。
半个月之内，百分之九十九的受感染生命体转变成了不受控制的怪物。
在英国留学的邵明接到消息，在遥远的家乡仍然有一片未被感染的安全区。
现在，他必须横跨整个欧亚大陆，去寻找那最后一片净土。
没有系统，没有超人体质，没有进化，唯一可以信赖的只有手中的武器，以及一列行驶在轨道上的列车。
穿越废土，我们失去的不止有身边的亲朋，还有被磨灭的人性。
捡物资，捡幸存者，升级火车，加固车厢，跟着主角一步步杀出重围，冲向那片最后的净土。
有限的弹药，损坏的武器，真实的现代化热武器实力，带给你最真实的废土求生之旅。
！！本故事纯属虚构架空，无具体时间，世界指向，全书保证无任何影射现实情节，仅为增强带入感而在部分情节采用部分世界地名，与真实世界无关，请读者朋友和审核大大注意分辨！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/50e718e7395f93308317a59b62a70486","author":"北北北馥","author_id":"","book_id":"7207613634954923060","book_name":"丧尸专列","book_short_name":"末世火车之旅","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":869,"name":"废土","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=869&name=废土&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7207613704052048395","read_count":"71478","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1600312"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"778","tags":"科幻末世,穿越,末世,求生,末日求生,废土","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob000ad8d97185dcd4dbec37549cc1e54~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429396&x-signature=UAu2JUSwmK7godKlA7cWqckinys%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3145080543393096","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.808258e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231356368DCE88074EAEA6B59D5B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suf 真想能看到它被拍成电视剧啊 作者大大加油 加油加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724228748,"group_id":"7207613634954923060","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"809661466948384"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7207613634954923060","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1330"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读43小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":86,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":155323,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7325075205663425321","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"谁懂呀 一边查各种资料（有超多有意思的从来没接触到的知识）一边看欧洲地图 感觉跟他们一起在冒险！太真实了，再加上穿插的情节，小说有自己独立的世界观，并且人物说话都是那种英文翻译过来的感觉，特别细节，看了这么多丧尸小说真的头一次被惊喜到了，我读的很慢 仔细看作者描绘的每一段文字，脑海中也搭建还原出了真实场景，深入其中，跟随主角一起体验各种心情，绝对值得细细品味，希望作者大大加油 现在读到连载的一半，95%的部分都逻辑非常在线。作者选择大范围的平铺直叙来写这本书就很考验讲故事的能力，通过大篇幅的人物对话和细节行为来塑造人物性格同样考验作者的笔力。但是作者都处理的非常好，虽然可能是个偏小众的赛道，但是就文章本身质量来说已经是顶中顶了，有些地方的处理略显着急，但是也无伤大雅，总之可以预见是一个好故事了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717335517,"group_id":"7207613634954923060","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8wZON3MVRT4+qhvIA4UPLK47Ns38FUyU1teBWiodU08","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2559287885824397","user_name":"喜欢决列的洪天王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2559287885824397","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7207613634954923060","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世，超真实，无系统，硬核，火车，重卡，慢节奏，公路文】
